notes: Spartan king known for his just and gentle nature, prominent in Plutarch's Lives.

docs.title: Life of Agesilaus
docs.author: Plutarch
docs.excerpt: … life having added to his natural kingly and commanding qualities the gentle and humane feelings of a citizen.
